creator: eadler@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Mon, Jan 2, 2012 at 5:08 AM, Frank Wall <fw@moov.de> wrote:
>
>> State-Changed-When: Mon Jan 2 03:58:25 UTC 2012
>> State-Changed-Why:
>> Can the patch please be submitted upstream? We don't like to maintain
>> forks of software in our ports tree without good reason.
>
>
> Thanks for this suggestion. I've created a patch upstream, but I don't
> know if the original upstream is still maintaining this port:
>
> https://sourceforge.net/tracker/?func=detail&atid=732040&aid=3468354&group_id=134942
>
> If everything else fails I will take over and fork/maintain this projects.

Sounds great! In the meantime I'll mark this PR as suspended. Please
email me if you want to take over upstream as well.


-- 
Eitan Adler
Ports committer
X11, Bugbusting teams
